title: Section 20A
content: 1[20A. Power to purchase redeemable stock at a premium.--(1) A trustee may invest in any of the securities mentioned or referred to in section 20, notwithstanding that the same may be redeemable and that the price exceeds the redemption value: 2* * * * * (2) A trustee may retain until redemption any redeemable stock, fund or security which may have been purchased in accordance with this section.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 1 of 1916, s. 3. 2. The proviso omitted by Act 34 of 2016, s. 3 (w.e.f. 17-4-2017).
